chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.329 of 2022 Nawabzadi Aliya Khanji Versus Khawaja Muhammad Nasir & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply at “A” 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 09.09.2025 Mirza Sarfaraz Ahmed, advocate for appellant. None for respondents. -.-.- Learned counsel for the appellant, on instructions, does not press instant High Court Appeal, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge
